description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the quay.io/python-devs/ci-image Docker image and define stages test, qa, docs, codecov, and deploy. In the test stage add a benchmark job that runs tox -e perf, a coverage job that runs tox -e py27-cov,py35-cov,py36-cov,py37-cov,py38-cov and uploads coverage.xml as an artifact, a diffcov job that runs tox -e py27-diffcov,py35-diffcov,py36-diffcov,py37-diffcov,py38-diffcov, and a tests job that runs tox -e py27,py35,py36,py37,py38. In the qa stage add a qa job that runs tox -e qa. In the docs stage add a docs job that runs tox -e docs. In the codecov stage add a codecov job that runs codecov, triggers on_success, and in the deploy stage add a release job that runs tox -e release only for tags matching the regex "/^v\d+\.\d+(\.\d+)?([abc]\d*)?$/".
